message:
feat: LISR-2 complete — confidence scoring + gating decision API

- ConfidenceReport with weighted deterministic signals: parse quality,
  ambiguity penalties, intent signal richness, import/export presence
- compute_confidence() produces score 0.0–1.0 with explainable reasons
- GatingDecision enum: Allow/Suggest/Deny with threshold-based logic
- GatingVerdict with structured reason codes and remediation guidance
- compute_gating_verdict() combines confidence with gating decisions
- 16 new tests (confidence scoring + gating API) — 188 total in file

Beads: bd-k5q5.9.2.3, bd-k5q5.9.2.4, bd-k5q5.9.2 (epic closed)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
